title: Generate a content matrix successfully and replace the sample matrix
description: Verifies a user can fill all required intake fields, generate a matrix, and see the sample banner disappear after a successful response.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill "Acme Launch Kit" into the Product Name required input field
Fill "A toolkit that helps startups plan, produce, and schedule launch content across channels." into the Product Description required textarea field
Fill "Early-stage founders and small marketing teams" into the Target Users required textarea field
Fill "Content calendar templates, idea generator, channel guidelines" into the Core Features required textarea field
Click the Generate Content Matrix button
Verify element "3 animated loading skeleton cards" is visible
Verify element "Generated content matrix" is visible

title: Validation: Product Name required shows inline error when missing
description: Verifies client-side validation blocks submission and shows an inline error when Product Name is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill "A toolkit that helps startups plan, produce, and schedule launch content across channels." into the Product Description required textarea field
Fill "Early-stage founders and small marketing teams" into the Target Users required textarea field
Fill "Content calendar templates, idea generator, channel guidelines" into the Core Features required textarea field
Click the Generate Content Matrix button
Verify element "error-productName" is visible

title: Validation: Product Description required shows inline error when missing
description: Verifies client-side validation blocks submission and shows an inline error when Product Description is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill "Acme Launch Kit" into the Product Name required input field
Fill "Early-stage founders and small marketing teams" into the Target Users required textarea field
Fill "Content calendar templates, idea generator, channel guidelines" into the Core Features required textarea field
Click the Generate Content Matrix button
Verify element "error-description" is visible

title: Validation: Target Users required shows inline error when missing
description: Verifies client-side validation blocks submission and shows an inline error when Target Users is empty.

Fill "Acme Launch Kit" into the Product Name required input field
Fill "A toolkit that helps startups plan, produce, and schedule launch content across channels." into the Product Description required textarea field
Fill "Content calendar templates, idea generator, channel guidelines" into the Core Features required textarea field
Click the Generate Content Matrix button

title: Validation: Core Features required shows inline error when missing

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill "Acme Launch Kit" into the Product Name required input field
Fill "A toolkit that helps startups plan, produce, and schedule launch content across channels." into the Product Description required textarea field
Fill "Early-stage founders and small marketing teams" into the Target Users required textarea field
Click the Generate Content Matrix button
Verify element "error-coreFeatures" is visible

title: Generate matrix and verify it restores on reload without sample banner
description: Verifies a successfully generated matrix is persisted and restored on a subsequent page load with no sample banner and expected content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "Acme Analytics" into the Product Name field
Type "A B2B analytics platform that turns product usage into actionable insights." into the Product Description field
Type "Product managers, growth teams, and data analysts" into the Target Users field
Type "Funnels, cohort analysis, dashboards, alerts" into the Core Features field
Click on the Generate Content Matrix button
Verify text "Sample" is not visible
Verify element "Tier 1" is visible

title: Restore happens immediately on reload (no loading skeleton shown)
description: Verifies that after a generation, reloading shows the matrix immediately without any loading/skeleton state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "Nimbus CRM" into the Product Name field
Type "A lightweight CRM for small sales teams." into the Product Description field
Type "Small business sales reps and sales managers" into the Target Users field
Type "Leads, pipelines, email templates, reporting" into the Core Features field
Click on the Generate Content Matrix button
Reload the page
Verify element "Content Matrix" is visible

title: Restored matrix displays all tier headings after reload
description: Verifies that the restored matrix preserves and displays all tier headings after a page reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "Pulse Scheduler" into the Product Name field
Type "Appointment scheduling for clinics with automated reminders." into the Product Description field
Type "Clinic admins, doctors, and front-desk staff" into the Target Users field
Type "Calendar sync, SMS reminders, intake forms, payments" into the Core Features field
Click on the Generate Content Matrix button
Reload the page
Verify element "Tier 1" is visible

title: Restored matrix shows card content (not empty placeholders) after reload
description: Verifies the restored matrix includes visible card text content rather than empty placeholders.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "Forge DevTools" into the Product Name field
Type "Developer tooling to speed up CI troubleshooting." into the Product Description field
Type "DevOps engineers and backend developers" into the Target Users field
Type "Build logs, flaky test detection, failure grouping" into the Core Features field
Click on the Generate Content Matrix button
Reload the page
Verify element "Tier 1" is visible
Verify text "Forge DevTools" is visible

title: Generating a second time overwrites persisted matrix and restores the latest on reload
description: Verifies that the latest successful generation replaces the previously persisted matrix and is the one restored after reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "Alpha Notes" into the Product Name field
Type "A team note-taking app for project documentation." into the Product Description field
Type "Engineering teams and project managers" into the Target Users field
Type "Markdown, search, templates, permissions" into the Core Features field
Click on the Generate Content Matrix button
Type "Beta Notes" into the Product Name field
Click on the Generate Content Matrix button
Reload the page
Verify text "Beta Notes" is visible

title: No sample banner after reload when a persisted matrix exists
description: Verifies that once a matrix has been generated and persisted, the sample banner does not appear on subsequent visits.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "Cedar HR" into the Product Name field
Type "HR onboarding workflows for distributed teams." into the Product Description field
Type "HR managers and team leads" into the Target Users field
Type "Onboarding checklists, doc collection, task assignments" into the Core Features field
Click on the Generate Content Matrix button
Reload the page
Verify text "Sample" is not visible
